apahastita p. p. Thrown away, discarded, abandoned, cast off, given up; ˚sakalasakhījanaṃ tvayi
(pb) viśvasiti me hṛdayaṃ  K. 233 , 202 ; ˚bāṃdhave tvayā  Māl. 9. 19 ; ayaṃ mama ˚lajjo vyavasāyaḥ  V. 2 ;  Ki. 9. 36.
